import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let haystack = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end

  let needle = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end

  let needle_byte = match string.byte_at(needle, 0)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end

  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let hay_len = string.len(haystack)

  while i < hay_len
    let b = match string.byte_at(haystack, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == needle_byte and needle_byte >= 0
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
